laborer:DefaultUncommonSkill.NAME: A Better Defend
laborer:DefaultUncommonSkill.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Plated Armor. Affected by Dexterity.

laborer:DefaultRareSkill.NAME: For Each Loop x2
laborer:DefaultRareSkill.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! vulnerable to all enemies, 2 times.
laborer:DefaultRareSkill.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! vulnerable to all enemies, 3 times.

laborer:DefaultRarePower.NAME: In-Progress Form
laborer:DefaultRarePower.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, play a TOUCH.

laborer:DefaultAttackWithVariable.NAME: Special Strike
laborer:DefaultAttackWithVariable.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! Damage [E] times. NL (Deal !laborer:ENERGY_DAMAGE! damage total.)

laborer:DefaultSecondMagicNumberSkill.NAME: Cool 2 Number Card
laborer:DefaultSecondMagicNumberSkill.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! vulnerable and !laborer:SecondMagic! poison to an enemy.
